_comment: Claude external-audit pool. Claude-governed. Codex executes the gateway but never edits this file and never sees a token. Each account reads from the dedicated 'claude-audit-pool/<alias>' Keychain namespace ONLY — never the live 'Claude Code-credentials'. Populate via: owner `claude /login <account>` then `claude-audit-gateway store --alias <alias>`. cc-account (retired 2026-06-14) must NEVER be revived.

poolPolicy.populationStatus: PENDING owner /login + store for all 3 (codex deleted accounts b/c creds during 2026-06-19 decontamination)
poolPolicy.policyOnPoolDegradation: If `check` shows fewer than 1 usable account, `run` exits non-zero and the caller must disclose the degraded ratio — do not silently proceed.

accounts.note: Populate with: owner `claude /login` jascawow, then `claude-audit-gateway store --alias claude-max-a`.
Credential deleted in 2026-06-19 decontamination. Populate with: owner `claude /login` rssprivacy, then `store --alias claude-max-b`.
Credential deleted in 2026-06-19 decontamination. Populate with: owner `claude /login` sopranoquan, then `store --alias claude-max-c`.
